SEARCH
Package io.github.simplejdbcmapper.relationship

Class Relationship

java.lang.Object
io.github.simplejdbcmapper.relationship.Relationship
All Implemented Interfaces:
GetListSpec, PopulateSpec, RelationshipSpec, ToManySpec, ToOneSpec
public class Relationship extends Object implements RelationshipSpec, ToManySpec, ToOneSpec, PopulateSpec, GetListSpec
The relationship. It uses the query results and information provided through the API to populate the target property.

Does not access database or use SimpleJdbcMapper. It just assembles the relationship tree.

For more details see the documentation

Author:
Antony Joseph

    • joinOn

      public PopulateSpec joinOn(String mainObjJoinProperty, String relatedObjJoinProperty)
      Description copied from interface: ToManySpec
      The properties on each list whose values should be matched to populate the toMany relationship. The java type of both the properties have to be exactly the same.
      Specified by:
      joinOn in interface ToManySpec
      Specified by:
      joinOn in interface ToOneSpec
      Parameters:
      mainObjJoinProperty - The main object id
      relatedObjJoinProperty - The related object foreign key used for matching
      Returns:
      The populateSpec

    • through

      public PopulateSpec through(Class<?> throughType, String fkPropertyToMainObjId, String fkPropertyToRelatedObjId)
      Description copied from interface: ToManySpec
      The 'through' information when defining a toMany relationship through an intermediate table (one side of many to many).
      Specified by:
      through in interface ToManySpec
      Parameters:
      throughType - The intermediate type
      fkPropertyToMainObjId - the foreign key property that matches the main object's id
      fkPropertyToRelatedObjId - The foreign key property that matches the related object's id
      Returns:
      the PopulateSpec

    • populate

      public GetListSpec populate(String propertyToPopulateOnMainObj)
      Description copied from interface: PopulateSpec
      Processes the relationship and populates the target property.

      For a toMany relationship the target property always has to be a List.

      Specified by:
      populate in interface PopulateSpec
      Parameters:
      propertyToPopulateOnMainObj - the target property on the main object which needs to be populated.

    • getList

      public <T> List<T> getList(Class<T> type)
      Description copied from interface: GetListSpec
      Gets list by type for the relationship
      Specified by:
      getList in interface GetListSpec
      Parameters:
      type - the type
      Returns:
      the list of type
